remember: Students will be able to recall the different types of landforms and their characteristics.
Students will be able to identify the various processes of landform evolution.
Students will be able to describe the different stages of landform development.
understand: Students will be able to explain the concept of geomorphic cycles and their role in landform evolution.
Students will be able to distinguish between different types of landforms, such as mountains, plateaus, and plains.
Students will be able to describe the relationship between landforms and the processes that shape them.
apply: Students will be able to apply their knowledge of landform evolution to real-world scenarios, such as understanding the formation of landscapes.
Students will be able to use their knowledge of landforms to identify and explain the characteristics of different regions.
Students will be able to analyze the impact of human activities on landforms and the environment.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the factors that influence landform evolution, such as tectonic activity, weathering, and erosion.
Students will be able to evaluate the role of different geomorphic processes in shaping landforms.
Students will be able to compare and contrast different landforms and their characteristics.

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT objective 1, to understand the concept of landforms and their evolution.
To comprehend the processes of landform development, including weathering, erosion, and deposition.
To recognize the importance of landforms in understanding the Earth's surface processes.
board_exam_objectives: What CBSE tests from this chapter: the ability to define and describe different landforms, explain the processes of landform evolution, and apply knowledge of landforms to real-world scenarios.
CBSE tests the ability to identify and analyze the characteristics of different landforms, including mountains, plateaus, and plains.
CBSE evaluates the understanding of geomorphic cycles and the role of human activities in shaping landforms.
